observations: OV prefill logits match PyTorch within fp16 precision; top-1 is 100%.
OV GPU generation closely matches the PyTorch reference (three lines recognised).

OV CPU generation degenerates into a repeated token — prefill is correct (see logits match), so this points to a runtime numerics issue in the iterative decode path on CPU (likely fp16 KV cache accumulation) rather than a modeling bug.

PP-DocLayout-V3 is delivered as a standalone pipeline (examples/openvino/glm_ocr/pp_doclayout_v3/) converted to OV IR via paddle2onnx + ov.convert_model; it is not registered with the optimum exporter.
